# Umculo

> Custom artist websites for South African musicians.

Umculo builds and hosts music websites for South African artists. Monthly subscription. No setup fee. Sites run on `yourname.umculo.app`.

## Pricing

- **Basic Website:** R99/month — profile, bio, gallery, press page
- **Website + Blog:** R149/month
- **Website + Music Sales:** R199/month
- **Website + Merch:** R399/month
- **Special Project:** from R699/month, quoted individually

Each tier includes everything in the tier below it.

## Operator

Qwabi Engineering (Namoota Technology Pty Ltd), in partnership with Xhosa Hip Hop.

## Contact

- Form: https://umculo.app/#contact
- Email: aya@qwabi.co.za
- Phone: +27603116777

## Live sites

- https://savage.umculo.app
- https://mzukhona.umculo.app
- https://ndlulamthi.umculo.app
